questions.question: Spell the word: beautiful
questions.explanation: Beautiful means very pretty or attractive.

questions.question: Spell the word: science
questions.explanation: Science is the study of the natural world.

questions.question: Spell the word: dinosaur
questions.explanation: Dinosaurs were giant reptiles that lived millions of years ago.

questions.question: Spell the word: elephant
questions.explanation: Elephant is the largest land animal with a trunk.

questions.question: Spell the word: rainbow
questions.explanation: Rainbow is a colorful arc in the sky after rain.

questions.question: Spell the word: butterfly
questions.explanation: Butterfly is an insect with colorful wings.

questions.question: Spell the word: computer
questions.explanation: Computer is an electronic device for processing information.

questions.question: Spell the word: chocolate
questions.explanation: Chocolate is a sweet treat made from cocoa.

questions.question: Spell the word: adventure
questions.explanation: Adventure is an exciting or unusual experience.

questions.question: Spell the word: universe
questions.explanation: Universe is all of space and everything in it.
